summary: Iteration 5 backend + frontend verification PASS. New /api/stats endpoint returns all 6 integer counters (>=0). /api/meta still returns fal_configured=true. Password reset end-to-end works with the new hashed-token (sha256) implementation: forgot returns dev_reset_link only in dev for known emails, reset rotates the password, single-use enforced, replay rejected, then restored admin pwd back to BloxCraft2026!. DB schema verified: db.password_reset_tokens stores 'token_hash' (sha256 hex) and NOT plaintext 'token'. Pillow guard verified: 64x64 PNG accepted, 8000x8000 PNG rejected with 400. Frontend landing rebuild verified: '127 creations in the last hour' is GONE; new data-testid='hero-live-stats' grid renders 3 cards (Creations 137 / Creators 28 / Battles 12) reading real numbers from /api/stats; SYS · ONLINE terminal ticker strip visible at top of hero; .glitch element renders 'IN 60 SECONDS.'; 11 holo-border feature cards rendered; 'Roblox Marketplace Export' (5th card) present; bottom CTA reads 'YOUR NEXT BESTSELLER IS ONE PROMPT AWAY.' with '▍ FINAL BOSS: SHIPPING' label above. Combined regression (backend_test.py + test_iteration4.py): 37 PASS / 1 SKIP / 1 FAIL — the FAIL is the known-stale test_text_to_3d_flow_and_credit_deduct (live FAL latency, flagged since iter-4). New iter-5 suite: 10/10 PASS.

minor.issue: test_text_to_3d_flow_and_credit_deduct still expects demo-mode completion ~12s but FAL is LIVE — pre-existing stale test (called out in iteration-4 action items). Not a product regression.

action_items: (carry-over from iter-4) Fix backend_test.py::test_text_to_3d_flow_and_credit_deduct to branch on /api/meta.fal_configured (live fal.ai needs 2-3 min poll window). Not blocking — already documented as stale.
critical_code_review_comments: password_routes.py — token_hash (sha256) + _is_dev() gating look correct. Note: bcrypt is imported but unused (line 17). Minor lint cleanup.
password_routes.py — reset link query carries the raw token in URL; consider one-time HTTPOnly cookie or short-lived JWT for stronger security, but sha256 storage + 1h TTL + single-use is acceptable.
server.py /api/stats — counts done with 6 separate Mongo queries each request; fine for current scale but consider a small in-memory TTL cache (10s) if landing page traffic grows.

server.py /api/stats today_creations — compares created_at ISO strings lexically against today_start.isoformat(); only safe because all docs use the same UTC isoformat with offset. If any code path stores naïve datetimes or different ISO variants, this comparison can silently undercount.
upload_routes.py — Image.MAX_IMAGE_PIXELS = 50_000_000 set at module import; good guard, but ensure it runs before any other code calls PIL.Image.open elsewhere in the process.

Landing.jsx — 11 elements use .holo-border; ensure framer-motion + WebGL viewer animations are throttled on low-power devices (already saw 'GPU stall due to ReadPixels' warnings in console — informational, not a bug).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5.py (new — 10 tests: /api/stats, /api/meta, hashed-token reset flow + schema check, Pillow upload guard)

success_rate.backend: 47/49 across iter-5 (10/10) + iter-4 (13/14, 1 skip) + backend_test (24/25, 1 known-stale FAIL). Product API surface 100% functional.
success_rate.frontend: 100% — every iter-5 visual + integration target verified on the live landing page.

test_credentials: Admin: admin@bloxcraft.ai / BloxCraft2026! — verified restored after the password-reset flow test.
seed_data_creation: None new. Reset flow rotated admin password to NewBlox2026! mid-test then restored to BloxCraft2026!.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 = visual overhaul + security hardening. New backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5.py (10 tests). New endpoint: GET /api/stats (public, no auth, 6 integer counters). Password reset now stores sha256(token) as token_hash — plaintext OLD tokens from iter-4 do not validate (expected). dev_reset_link only present when ENV != production AND user exists. Pillow MAX_IMAGE_PIXELS = 50M set at module import; 4096 max-side rule rejects huge uploads first. Frontend landing.jsx removed '127 creations' fake pill — DO NOT add it back; replace with data-testid='hero-live-stats' live grid. The 'IN 60 SECONDS.' headline is inside .glitch element (1 instance). 11 .holo-border feature cards. Known carry-over stale test: backend_test::test_text_to_3d_flow_and_credit_deduct fails because FAL is live (2-3 min) — fix per iter-4 action items.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found in iteration 5. The single regression FAIL is the previously-documented stale test (FAL live latency, iter-4 action item).
